title: Briefing Draft
description: Schema for the JSON blob produced by scripts/generate-email.js and consumed by scripts/send.js. Intentionally restricted to {subject, htmlBody} — recipient (to), sender (from), cc, bcc, and reply-to MUST come from environment variables / loadConfig() and are NEVER read from the draft. This schema enforces that trust boundary: any draft with a `to` field is rejected.
